info.name: GoMobility — Driver App API
info.description: Complete accurate API collection for GoMobility Driver Application. Base URL: https://api.gomobility.co.in/api/v1

request.description: Fields: phone (required, 10-digit Indian), fullName (optional), email (optional), role (required: 'driver')
OTP 6 digits. role is required. Returns accessToken + refreshToken.
Driver row is auto-created at signup for role=driver. Body can be empty.
12-digit Aadhaar number. OTP goes to Aadhaar-linked mobile.
pan_number format: ABCDE1234F (5 letters, 4 digits, 1 letter)
ifsc format: 4 letters + 0 + 6 alphanumeric (e.g. SBIN0001234)
dob format: DD-MM-YYYY (e.g. 01-01-1990)
rc_number: Vehicle registration number e.g. DL01AB1234

item.name: 4.1 Upload File to S3 (Pehle yeh karo)

request.description: Pehle file upload karo S3 pe, wapas S3 URL milega. Phir us URL ko document endpoints mein use karo.
aadhaar_front & back: S3 URLs from /kyc-upload. consent_given must be string 'true'.
pan_dob: ISO8601 format (YYYY-MM-DD). pan_number: ABCDE1234F format.

response.name: 201 Success

request.description: account_type: 'saving' or 'current'. ifsc_code: SBIN0001234 format.

response.name: 201 Success

request.description: All dates: ISO8601 (YYYY-MM-DD). license_expiry_date must be in future.
vehicle_type: bike/auto/car. vehicle_number: DL01AB1234 format. RC fields required. Insurance & Permit optional.
Replace '1' with actual driver ID
isAvailable: true = Online, false = Offline
⚠️ Real-time map tracking ke liye WebSocket driver:location_update use karo, yeh sirf DB update karta hai
Replace 123 with actual rideId (integer)
No body required. rideId in URL (integer).

response.name: 200 Success

request.description: status values: driver_arrived | in_progress | completed | cancelled
No body. OTP passenger ke phone pe SMS hoga.
⚠️ OTP 4 digits hai (6 nahi). Passenger batayega OTP driver ko.
reason_code is REQUIRED. reason_text optional.

query.description: ISO date YYYY-MM-DD (required, must be after from)

request.description: deposit_method: upi | bank_transfer | cash_center. amount min ₹1 max ₹50000.
Replace 5 with actual penaltyId. No body required.
reason: min 10 chars, max 500 chars. Required.
⚠️ Flat fields - latitude, longitude, address directly. Nested object mat dena. radius_km optional (default 3.0, max 10).
ride_id, reviewee_id, reviewer_type, reviewee_type, rating are REQUIRED. Tags for passenger: polite|on_time|clean_seating|followed_route|no_complaints
Replace 5 with passenger's userId
review_id (integer) aur response (min 3 chars) dono required.
